cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Ayesha ji, Welcome to IndusInd Bank. How can I assist you today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir. I've lost my debit card and I need to block it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, don't worry Ayesha ji. I'm here to help. To proceed, may I please verify your date of birth?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: My date of birth is 12th February 1990.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, and can you please confirm your registered mobile number with us?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, thank you for verifying, Ayesha ji. I'll now block your card and guide you through the re-issuance process.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds good, sir. Please proceed.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Your card has been blocked. For the new card, you will receive an SMS with the re-issuance details.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that's fine. How long will it take for the new card to arrive?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It will take around 7 working days, Ayesha ji. You will receive updates on your registered mobile number.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, sir. That's all, thank you for your help.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, Ayesha ji. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you for choosing IndusInd Bank, Ayesha ji. Have a great day!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too, sir. Bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, Ayesha ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, can I ask one more thing?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, Ayesha ji. Please go ahead.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What's the status of my account?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Let me check that for you. (pause) Everything looks fine, Ayesha ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, thanks for checking.

scenario_info.description: Reporting a Lost Card: A legitimate agent guides the user through the process of blocking their lost debit card and issuing a new one, following all correct verification steps.
